# Task Metadata

## Task ID
task 4

## Title
Create a yellow cube button widget with icon

## Stack
Flutter

## Action
Create a yellow cube button widget with icon

## Skip Flags
- Skip Designer: True
- Skip Developer: False
- Skip Tester: True

## Max QA Retries
3 (default)

## Instructions
Create test/yellow_cube_button.dart with a StatelessWidget called YellowCubeButton. 80x80 yellow square. Center a star icon (Icons.star, color: Colors.white, size: 32). Prints "Yellow pressed" on tap.

artifacts.implementation_plan:
# Implementation Plan: Create a yellow cube button widget with icon

## Goal
Create `test/yellow_cube_button.dart` containing a `YellowCubeButton` StatelessWidget — an 80x80 yellow square with a centered white star icon that prints "Yellow pressed" on tap.

## Owns (Files to Create/Modify)
- **Create**: `test/yellow_cube_button.dart` — new StatelessWidget file

## Integrates Into
- Standalone widget in `test/` directory — no integration into existing app tree required

## Implementation Details
